title: "Lighter" Wynn Mages' Spells
description: Makes Wynncraft Mage's Meteor and Ice Snakes a lot "lighter" (smaller)
body:
### ❓ What does resource pack change?
- **Meteor** size is reduced to `4x4x4` & **Meteor** trail is removed 
- **Ice Snake** height is reduced to `4` pixels

| Without the Resource Pack | With the Resource Pack |
|:---------------------:|:---------------------:|
|![Without the Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ypJnbHTL/images/9b3fbe6eb2f46ddbb7ecbf7b0ac6fb43f2fcda03.webp)            | ![With the Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ypJnbHTL/images/9baa19589b4685995951ed9361bdf6a557769987.webp)             |
